text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
One day, as I'm walking by the<n>academy
entrance...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Oh no... still not enough power! But<n>that was the
final finishing move in my<n>arsenal...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I was trying to muster up some<n>power to take on
my next race!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
There's no way I could show my<n>face to my
wrestler papa if I lose in a<n>battle of strength!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I know! Fate must've brought you<n>here at
just the right time!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
You know of any ways to boost<n>power? Give me
some pointers, por<n>favor!
choice_data_list: You could eat a stamina-boosting meal.
You could try sprinting with a tire tied to you.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, interesante! So all I gotta do is<n>generate the
power from inside my<n>body, eh?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Gotta strike while the iron is caliente!<n>Off to the
cafeteriaaa!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh! Problem passionately solved!<n>Call me El
Condor Happy! That's a<n>great idea!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I'm muy motivada now! Time to hit<n>the traaack!
